allow: Bash(grep -n "func contextWithActor\\|func \(s \\*Service\) loadUserContext\\|func \(s \\*Service\) markFailed\\|func \(s \\*Service\) notifyTripBroadcast\\|func tripOwnerID\\|func \(s \\*Service\) enrichGeneratedItinerary" internal/application/service/*.go; echo "---contextWithActor body---"; sed -n '/func contextWithActor/,/^}/p' internal/application/service/*.go | head -20)
